data.name: Sinners Landing: Bane of Passion
data.detailed_description:
Sinners Landing: Bane of Passion is the sequel to the hit adult-romance RPG by Flexible Media, makers of the award-winning Paradise Lust!

The story picks up where the first game left off, going deeper into the town’s secrets, desires, and dangers. Explore new dungeons, battle strange monsters with the card-based combat system, uncover hidden treasures, and grow new romances with the beautiful women of Sinners Landing.

From Local Rogue to Divine Trouble!

Tristan Lamprey is a rogue, a cheat, a failed mage, an aspiring artist, and a reluctant hero. Hiding from a vengeful archmage and the mistakes of his past, he’s built a new life in the rough-and-tumble riverside village of Sinners Landing. 

A life that's about to change as the fiery goddess Flaminia calls him to a new quest filled with danger, desire, and lustful temptation. To earn his place among heroes, Tristan will have to face monsters, magic, and the dangerous and seductive powers that rule both heaven and flesh.

New Faces & Old Flames

The women of Sinners Landing burn with ambition, desire, and secrets, each drawn to Tristan Lamprey’s charm and chaos in their own way. You'll learn more about the girls you romanced in the original game, with new scenes, new challenges, and sexy new stories. 

Added to these beautiful ladies are sexy new arrivals from the distant Incense Isles, Zuvi and Shu, who bring exotic beauty and temptation from the East. And of course, Tristan will learn more about the Goddesses’ own chosen passionate playmate, Ophelia, and rekindle his fiery bond with the Mage-Princess Sumita. 

So many beautiful women, so little time...

Deeper Dungeons, Deadlier Foes

The adventure continues with new dungeons to explore, new monsters to fight, and new challenges to survive. You’ll face creatures like the Piscines, Dracospawn, Scarbids, and War Chimps while navigating traps, puzzles, and unexpected encounters. Each journey below brings different events and choices, making every descent its own story.

More Love, More Lust, More Landing

Romance the women of Sinners Landing and unlock fully animated scenes with more than a dozen lovers, each with her own story and desires. More scenes with the girls you know and love, and new scenes with beautiful and sexy new women. Every connection deepens the world, every encounter reveals more, and every choice leads somewhere worth exploring. 

The Art of Seduction

Sinners Landing: Bane of Passion brings new subgames that blend art, romance, and discovery. Create your own collection of beautiful images as you draw, paint, and photograph the women of the town. Each new collectible unlocks fresh scenes, stories, and secrets. With more art-focused challenges and creative rewards, every masterpiece brings you closer to the heart of Sinners Landing.

Wishlist Goals

We also put together a little game; the more wishlists we get the more content we'll add! If you want to do just one thing to help us succeed with the game, hit the wishlist button!

data.short_description: Sinners Landing: Bane of Passion continues the story of rogue mage Tristan Lamprey in a world of danger and divine temptation. Battle new monsters, explore new dungeons, and fall for new lovers while collecting art, unlocking scenes, and diving deeper into the seductive chaos of Sinners Landing.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (32-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100 / AMD FX-6300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible GPU (Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GT 1030 / AMD Radeon RX 550 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 (High Sierra)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (Dual-core)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 12 (Monterey) or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 / Intel Core i5 (Quad-core)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Apple M1 GPU / Radeon Pro 560X or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS, or Ubuntu 18.04 LTS (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100 / AMD FX-6300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.2 compatible GPU (Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS, or Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (64-bit) or equivalent
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 / AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GT 1030 / AMD Radeon RX 550 or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
